roles.name: Compression Algorithm Lead
roles.description: Owner of the middle-out vision — designs the over-arching platform and defends the Weissman score.

roles.name: Negotiator (Jared)
roles.description: Walks the team through impossible timelines with unwavering optimism and a colour-coded Gantt.

roles.name: Sysadmin in a Hoodie
roles.description: Keeper of permission sets, page layouts, and the office wifi password.

roles.name: 10X Engineer
roles.description: Cranks out Apex and LWC at 3am fuelled by Soylent and spite.

roles.name: VP of Engineering — USA
roles.description: Sets the engineering bar across the org and shields the team from product's worst ideas.

roles.name: Senior Backend Bro — Bangalore
roles.description: Carries hard delivery work with practiced craft and a Kubernetes obsession.

roles.name: Junior Stack Bro — Bangalore
roles.description: Picks up the tickets nobody else wants and ships them clean.

roles.name: Cloud Plumbing Architect
roles.description: Designs the pipes between Pied Piper, Hooli, AWS, and the seventeen vendor APIs of doom.

roles.name: Senior Pipe-fitter — Bangalore
roles.description: Lays middleware, event flows, and webhooks under the architect's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Pipe-fitter
roles.description: Learns the dark arts of retries, idempotency, and dead-letter queues.

roles.name: DevOps Wizard
roles.description: Breaks the build before customers can — owns regression, smoke, and the brutal Friday deploy review.

roles.name: Growth Hacker-in-Chief
roles.description: Heads brand, demand-gen, and the daily war on bounce rate.

roles.name: Brand Strategist
roles.description: Architects campaigns and decides whether the new logo really needs to be lowercase.

roles.name: Content Ninja
roles.description: Cranks out blog posts, landing pages, and tweet-storms on a 24-hour cycle.

roles.name: Product Whisperer
roles.description: Translates between the founder's hand-waving and the engineering team's eye-rolling.

roles.name: Principal Engineer — USA
roles.description: Reviews every PR, owns the gnarliest legacy code, and gets paged when prod is on fire.

roles.name: Bootcamp Grad
roles.description: Six months out of a coding bootcamp and ready to scale anything to a billion users.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

pied-piper.name: Compression Demo Day
pied-piper.description: Discovery sign-off — first middle-out demo passes the napkin test.

pied-piper.name: TechCrunch Disrupt
pied-piper.description: Build kickoff: launch on the Disrupt stage with a live Weissman score.

pied-piper.name: Series A Closed
pied-piper.description: Funding milestone: Raviga wires the cash, payroll un-blocked.

pied-piper.name: Pivot to Platform
pied-piper.description: Mid-project gate: consumer app shelved, B2B platform approved.

pied-piper.name: GA Launch
pied-piper.description: Go-Live: platform open to enterprise customers.

pied-piper.name: Acquisition Talks
pied-piper.description: Hyper-care close: Amazon, Google, and Hooli all circling.

hooli.name: Hoolicon Keynote
hooli.description: Project kickoff: Gavin announces Nucleus to a packed Shoreline.

hooli.name: Box-3 Hardware Reveal
hooli.description: Build phase: Endframe boxes physically deployed to the demo lab.

hooli.name: Patent Suit Settled
hooli.description: Legal gate: IP dispute with Pied Piper resolved on appeal.

hooli.name: Nucleus GA
hooli.description: Go-Live: enterprise rollout to first 50 Hooli customers.

hooli.name: Hooli-XYZ Spin-out
hooli.description: Project close: skunkworks team absorbed back into core.

hooli.name: Final Vendor Invoice
hooli.description: Final invoice: Hooli accounts payable processes the SOW.

raviga-capital.name: Term Sheet Signed
raviga-capital.description: Discovery: Raviga commits, project funded through GA.

raviga-capital.name: Cap Table Migration
raviga-capital.description: Build: portfolio companies onboarded into the new system.

raviga-capital.name: LP Annual Review
raviga-capital.description: Solution review: limited partners sign off on reporting.

raviga-capital.name: Down-Round Drill Passed
raviga-capital.description: Stress test: valuation engine handles a 70% haircut scenario.

raviga-capital.name: Platform GA
raviga-capital.description: Go-Live: deal pipeline platform live across all GPs.

raviga-capital.name: Carry Distribution
raviga-capital.description: Final invoice triggered alongside year-end carry payout.

aviato.name: Logo Unveiled
aviato.description: Kickoff: the Aviato logo (worth $5M, allegedly) revealed at Demo Day.

aviato.name: First Cohort Onboarded
aviato.description: Build: incubator residents installed in the hostel.

aviato.name: SeeFood Pivot Approved
aviato.description: Mid-build: side-venture shifts from hot-dog/not-hot-dog to octopus identifier.

aviato.name: Demo Day Pitches
aviato.description: UAT acceptance: cohort pitches to Sand Hill Road.

aviato.name: Incubator GA
aviato.description: Go-Live + handoff: ops platform running, residents fully self-serve.

aviato.name: Bachmanity Settlement
aviato.description: Final invoice: paid out from Bachmanity Holdings before bankruptcy.

Erlich Bachman.notes: Aviato founders' retreat — mushroom-assisted strategy session in Arizona.

Bertram Gilfoyle.notes: Burning Man — annual pilgrimage, on-call coverage by Dinesh (against his will).

Dinesh Chugtai.notes: Cousin Wajeed's wedding — has to wear a gold chain.

Jared Dunn.notes: Donovan family reunion — first contact in seven years.

Big Head.notes: Sabbatical on the Hooli rooftop — promoted upward, no actual duties.

Gavin Belson.notes: Spiritual quest with Denpok — Tibet, no devices.

Russ Hanneman.notes: Yacht maintenance in Half Moon Bay — McLaren also serviced.

Jian-Yang.notes: Visiting his uncle in Beijing — also possibly faking his own death.

Peter Gregory.notes: Burger King research trip — sesame seed sequencing study.

Jack Barker.notes: Horse ranch in Atherton — quarterly Conjoined Triangles review.

Keenan Feldspar.notes: VR demo tour — Oculus, HTC, anyone with a chequebook.
